message:
fix(render-canvas,render-svg): count title labels in canvas render result and align quadrant SVG with layout engine dimensions

Canvas: draw_generic_diagram_title now returns bool and increments labels_drawn.
Removes has_specialized_title_renderer filter — canvas lacks dedicated chart
title renderers. Two new tests for chart title rendering and label counting.

SVG quadrant: replaces layout.bounds-derived dimensions with the exact formula
from layout_diagram_quadrant_traced, ensuring axes align with node positions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
